TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kari pnsltulan ncbeyo bale ciida mesa,mtutuy lux kndalax quti banuy ka kingal seediq. Rahhur ba mtlubu qmita heya ka seediq.Mrengo ka seediq mntutuy kndalax quti babuy, "Trmai ku tikuh! Netur namu ptrima yaku,maha mntena qhuni Yangticiya ka hei namu,knbgurah pnryuxan ani betaq knuwan mpkuudus.Ani si netur namu ini ptrima yaku, mphuqil ani betaq knuwan ka hei namu." Abu kcceun bale sseediq, ini daha trmai.Yaani so nii ka pusu, kndalax ciida, niqal mhuqil ka seediq di.
S.PHON: ka…ĺi pnsltulan n ¶b…ôo bal…ô ¶iida m…ôsa,mtutuj lux kndalax quti banuj ka kiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq. …ĺańßńßu…ĺ ba mtlubu qmita ńß…ôa ka s…ô…ôdiq.m…ĺ…ôŇčo ka s…ô…ôdiq mntutuj kndalax quti babuj, "t…ĺmai ku tikuńß! n…ôtu…ĺ namu pt…ĺima jaku,mańßa mnt…ôna qńßuni jaŇčti ¶ija ka ńß…ôi namu,knbgu…ĺańß pn…ĺjuxan ani b…ôtaq knuwan mpkuudus.ani si n…ôtu…ĺ namu ini pt…ĺima jaku, mpńßuqil ani b…ôtaq knuwan ka ńß…ôi namu." abu k ¶ ¶…ôun bal…ô ss…ô…ôdiq, ini dańßa t…ĺmai.jaani so nii ka pusu, kndalax ¶iida, niqal mńßuqil ka s…ô…ôdiq di.
S.FORM: Kari pnsltulan ncbeyo bale ciida mesa,mtutuy lux kndalax quti banuy ka kingal seediq. Rahhur ba mtlubu qmita heya ka seediq.Mrengo ka seediq mntutuy kndalax quti babuy, "Trmai ku tikuh! Netur namu ptrima yaku,maha mntena qhuni Yangticiya ka hei namu,knbgurah pnryuxan ani betaq knuwan mpkuudus.Ani si netur namu ini ptrima yaku, mphuqil ani betaq knuwan ka hei namu." Abu kcceun bale sseediq, ini daha trmai.Yaani so nii ka pusu, kndalax ciida, niqal mhuqil ka seediq di.
S.PHON: ka…ĺi pnsltulan n ¶b…ôo bal…ô ¶iida m…ôsa,mtutuj lux kndalax quti banuj ka kiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq. …ĺańßńßu…ĺ ba mtlubu qmita ńß…ôa ka s…ô…ôdiq.m…ĺ…ôŇčo ka s…ô…ôdiq mntutuj kndalax quti babuj, "t…ĺmai ku tikuńß! n…ôtu…ĺ namu pt…ĺima jaku,mańßa mnt…ôna qńßuni jaŇčti ¶ija ka ńß…ôi namu,knbgu…ĺańß pn…ĺjuxan ani b…ôtaq knuwan mpkuudus.ani si n…ôtu…ĺ namu ini pt…ĺima jaku, mpńßuqil ani b…ôtaq knuwan ka ńß…ôi namu." abu k ¶ ¶…ôun bal…ô ss…ô…ôdiq, ini dańßa t…ĺmai.jaani so nii ka pusu, kndalax ¶iida, niqal mńßuqil ka s…ô…ôdiq di.
